payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Partial edge-cropped small beige low-pile area rug with muted floral motifs in pale green and brown; only the corner is visible against hardwood flooring and the weave appears slightly worn — visible portion suggests a small area rug, approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
